data.content: Implementation review approved against feat/foolery-9b5c-prefix at bc0930a4. The reviewed change switches beat and terminal ID prefix stripping from first-hyphen to last-hyphen logic in beat navigation/display, terminal tab parsing, and history ID stripping, which preserves full hyphenated project prefixes and returns the expected local ID suffix. Regression tests now cover feature-builder style IDs for beat navigation, beat display, hierarchical aliases, and terminal tab IDs, and I found no acceptance-criteria or invariant violations in the reviewed patch.
